matcher_value: $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName=@('System','Application'); StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -match 'BugCheck|Microsoft-Windows-WER-SystemErrorReporting|Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Power' -or $_.Message -match '(?i)bugcheck|bluescreen|livekernelevent|kernel panic|panicking' -or ($_.Id -eq 41 -and $_.ProviderName -eq 'Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-Power') } | Select-Object TimeCreated,LogName,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}}; if($e){$e | Format-Table -Wrap -Auto}else{'No panic-like kernel events found in the last 30 days.'}
